title: Light Briny Australian Pecorino Bisque
description: A cozy and refreshing Australian dish featuring the tangy flavors of Pecorino cheese served in a copper mug.
instructions: In a copper mug, combine Pecorino cheese, tandoor-roasted garlic, zucchini, and parsley.
Heat the mixture over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the cheese is melted and the soup is smooth.
Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add white wine vinegar and whisk until combined.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve immediately in the copper mug.
Garnish with additional parsley or lemon wedges if desired.
Reheat as needed, but be careful not to overheat the soup, which can cause the cheese to become grainy.
If reheating, stir in a small amount of water or broth to prevent the soup from becoming too thick.
Consider serving with a side of crusty bread or crackers for dipping in the soup.
